briefs.title: BC Securities Rules Updated: WKSI Shelf Prospectus Fees Now Have New Filing Deadlines
briefs.summary: BC updated its securities rules to add a new type of fundraising document called a WKSI base shelf prospectus (a fast-track filing used by large, well-known companies to raise money from the public) and set out specific fee-reporting deadlines for it.
briefs.action_required: If you file a WKSI base shelf prospectus in BC, report gross proceeds and pay fees within 5 business days after each month-end or within 30 days after each tranche closes.

key_dates.label: BC WKSI base shelf prospectus fee rules take effect
